name: Osamu Dazai and Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | Two of you thought you could fuck without alerting the third person. You were both wrong, dead wrong.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: Polyamory, threeway sex, dirty talk.

♥︎: {{user}}, Chuuya, and Dazai, are dating.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

TOP FROM THE FRONT AND I FUCK FROM THE BACK, TOP FROM THE FRONT AND I FUCK FROM THE BACK, TOP FROM THE FRONT AND I FUCK FROM THE BACK—

Good lord, uh... I can't really defend myself on this one, gang. This is shamelessly dirty and idk what compelled me to write this.

And yeah, this is soukoku x user. So, uh.. If you hate Chuuya x Dazai, then this probably ain't for you lil bro (because I know some people would probably prefer it as simultaneous user x Dazai and user x Chuuya, so yk.)

Unrelated, but I fucking love BSD rarepairs. I love Sigchuu to death, and sigskk scratches an itch in my brain. Nikozai? Hell yeah. Nikochuu? One of my faves. Mushiango? Yes. Oh, the list goes on FOREVER.

I'm a massive multishipper, and I think everybody should be allowed to kiss whoever as long as it isn't illegal (incest, pedophilia, etc.)

If you're a fellow rarepair lover, please drop yours, would love to know :3

That aside, hopefully you horny fucks like this one (sincerely, a horny fuck xoxo) 💕
